hero.title: Unified Data Ingestion.
hero.subtitle: The ultimate framework to centralize, transform, and route your information to any destination, frictionlessly.

capabilities.title: Limitless Capabilities
capabilities.subtitle: Discover how Witral empowers your data infrastructure.

ingestion.title: Dynamic Ingestion
ingestion.description: Orchestrate and normalize massive data volumes from multiple sources into a standardized format in real-time.

plugins.title: Plugin Expansion
plugins.description: A modular architecture that lets you build and inject custom transformers, validators, or connectors without modifying the core.

cloud.title: Cloud Providers
cloud.description: Native integration with leading providers like AWS, Google Cloud, and Azure. Route your processed data wherever you need it.

footer.text: Built with quality in mind. Witral Ingestion Framework.

workflow.title: The Unified Pipeline
workflow.subtitle: From the immediacy of a message to structured, persisted knowledge.

source.title: Ingestion Source
source.description: Accepts text streams or payloads from APIs or clients such as WhatsApp (via Baileys).

core.title: Core Processing
core.description: The CLI engine intercepts, formats, and applies transformer plugins in bare-metal milliseconds.

destination.title: Final Destination
destination.description: Native cloud syncing out-of-the-box, saving directly into Google Drive or repositories seamlessly.

stack.title: Architecture & Performance
stack.subtitle: Built for developers demanding total control over their data.

cli.title: 100% CLI-Driven
cli.description: The entire framework is orchestrated entirely from the command line. Zero visual bloatware. Ideal for CI/CD.

tech.title: Node.js & TypeScript
tech.description: Deep V8 optimizations and strong typing ensure fail-safe extensibility with extremely low memory footprint.

host.title: Self-Hosted & Private
host.description: Your data never transits third-party unauthorized servers. You own the infra, pipelines, and the encryption keys.

usecases.title: Zero Friction. Just Knowledge.
usecases.subtitle: Real examples of how Witral structures your daily chaos without changing your habits.

append.title: Append Mode (Add to list)
append.description: Detects the tag and appends the line to a single `buy.md` list, stored in the `Vault/tags` folder of your Obsidian.

newfile.title: New File Mode (Complex Ideas)
newfile.description: Generates a new file named `bypass-idea.md` with your idea, stored directly in `Vault/tags/project_x/`.

quickstart.title: Deploy in seconds.
quickstart.subtitle: Requires Docker and a Linux/WSL2 system. The interactive wizard handles the rest.

points.title: The Broken Habit
points.text: The potential of Second Brain systems is huge, but interrupting your workflow to open another app and structure notes creates enough friction to abandon the habit altogether.

points.title: The Natural Refuge
points.text: Conversely, using messaging apps like WhatsApp or Telegram as a personal notepad is universal. Their immediacy for saving links and reminders prevails simply because they are always within reach.

points.title: Zero Resistance
points.text: Witral eliminates this friction by letting you capture ideas from the chat interface you already use, while our core engine structures and routes the knowledge into your persistent vaults.
